verses.text: Praise the LORD from the heavens — angels, hosts, sun, moon, stars, and 'waters that be above the heavens.' All the high creation is summoned. Heaven and its hosts lead the chorus of praise.
Praise the LORD from the heavens — angels, hosts, sun, moon, stars, and 'waters that be above the heavens.' All the high creation is summoned. Heaven and its hosts lead the chorus of praise.
Praise the LORD from the heavens — angels, hosts, sun, moon, stars, and 'waters that be above the heavens.' All the high creation is summoned. Heaven and its hosts lead the chorus of praise.
Praise the LORD from the heavens — angels, hosts, sun, moon, stars, and 'waters that be above the heavens.' All the high creation is summoned. Heaven and its hosts lead the chorus of praise.

Let them praise His name, 'for he commanded, and they were created,' established for ever by His decree. Creation owes its being to His word. The God who spoke them into existence is worthy of their praise.

Let them praise His name, 'for he commanded, and they were created,' established for ever by His decree. Creation owes its being to His word. The God who spoke them into existence is worthy of their praise.
Praise the LORD from the earth — sea creatures, fire, hail, snow, wind, mountains, trees, beasts, and birds. The whole earth joins in. Every part of creation has a voice in the worship of its Maker.
Praise the LORD from the earth — sea creatures, fire, hail, snow, wind, mountains, trees, beasts, and birds. The whole earth joins in. Every part of creation has a voice in the worship of its Maker.
Praise the LORD from the earth — sea creatures, fire, hail, snow, wind, mountains, trees, beasts, and birds. The whole earth joins in. Every part of creation has a voice in the worship of its Maker.
Praise the LORD from the earth — sea creatures, fire, hail, snow, wind, mountains, trees, beasts, and birds. The whole earth joins in. Every part of creation has a voice in the worship of its Maker.

Kings and peoples, young and old, are called to praise Him, for 'his name alone is excellent,' and He exalts 'the horn of his people.' All ranks of mankind must praise. The God who lifts up His saints is glorious above all.
